message:
Did you know your dog's tail is basically broadcasting their mood? Researchers found that the DIRECTION of a wag matters: dogs tend to wag more to their right side when they feel happy and relaxed (like the moment they spot someone they love), and more to the left when they're unsure or uneasy. 🐶➡️

So the next time your pup's tail goes wild to greet you, that happy right-side swing is basically a little love letter aimed straight at you. 💛

Comment 🐾 and tell us: does your dog's whole back end wag along with the tail?
